# CHECKSUM-LINES: 375
# CHECKSUM-MARKERS: 0 heredocs used - python3 method immune to close-token corruption
# VERIFY: line count of this file must equal 375

name: MyCursurAI Native ReBuild Part1

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:

      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up JDK 17
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          java-version: '17'
          distribution: 'temurin'

      - name: Set up Gradle 8.6
        uses: gradle/actions/setup-gradle@v3
        with:
          gradle-version: '8.6'

      - name: Set up Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3

      - name: Accept SDK licenses
        run: yes | sdkmanager --licenses || true

      - name: Install SDK packages
        run: sdkmanager "platforms;android-34" "build-tools;34.0.0" "platform-tools"

      - name: Create project directories
        run: |
          mkdir -p MyCursurAI-Native/app/src/main/java/com/mycursurai/chat
          mkdir -p MyCursurAI-Native/app/src/main/res/layout
          mkdir -p MyCursurAI-Native/app/src/main/res/values
          mkdir -p MyCursurAI-Native/gradle/wrapper

      - name: Write settings.gradle
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """pluginManagement {
    repositories {
        google()
        mavenCentral()
        gradlePluginPortal()
    }
}
dependencyResolutionManagement {
    repositoriesMode.set(RepositoriesMode.FAIL_ON_PROJECT_REPOS)
    repositories {
        google()
        mavenCentral()
    }
}
rootProject.name = "MyCursurAI-Native"
include ':app'
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/settings.gradle", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("settings.gradle written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write root build.gradle
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """buildscript {
    repositories {
        google()
        mavenCentral()
    }
    dependencies {
        classpath 'com.android.tools.build:gradle:8.2.2'
    }
}
allprojects {
    repositories {
        google()
        mavenCentral()
    }
}
task clean(type: Delete) {
    delete rootProject.buildDir
}
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/build.gradle", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("root build.gradle written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write app build.gradle
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """plugins {
    id 'com.android.application'
}
android {
    namespace 'com.mycursurai.chat'
    compileSdk 34
    defaultConfig {
        applicationId 'com.mycursurai.chat'
        minSdk 26
        targetSdk 34
        versionCode 1
        versionName '1.0'
        testInstrumentationRunner 'androidx.test.runner.AndroidJUnitRunner'
    }
    buildTypes {
        release {
            minifyEnabled false
            proguardFiles getDefaultProguardFile('proguard-android-optimize.txt'), 'proguard-rules.pro'
        }
    }
    compileOptions {
        sourceCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_17
        targetCompatibility JavaVersion.VERSION_17
    }
}
dependencies {
    implementation 'androidx.appcompat:appcompat:1.7.0'
    implementation 'com.google.android.material:material:1.12.0'
    implementation 'androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout:2.1.4'
    implementation 'androidx.core:core:1.16.0'
    testImplementation 'junit:junit:4.13.2'
    androidTestImplementation 'androidx.test.ext:junit:1.2.1'
    androidTestImplementation 'androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core:3.6.1'
}
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/app/build.gradle", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("app build.gradle written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write gradle-wrapper.properties
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """distributionBase=GRADLE_USER_HOME
distributionPath=wrapper/dists
distributionUrl=https\\://services.gradle.org/distributions/gradle-8.6-bin.zip
zipStoreBase=GRADLE_USER_HOME
zipStorePath=wrapper/dists
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("gradle-wrapper.properties written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write gradle.properties
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8
android.useAndroidX=true
android.enableJetifier=true
org.gradle.configuration-cache=false
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/gradle.properties", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("gradle.properties written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write AndroidManifest.xml
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
    <application
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
        android:label="@string/app_name"
        android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@style/Theme.MyCursurAI">
        <activity
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
    </application>
</manifest>
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("AndroidManifest.xml written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write colors.xml
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<resources>
    <color name="color_primary">#FF6200EE</color>
    <color name="color_primary_dark">#FF3700B3</color>
    <color name="color_accent">#FF03DAC5</color>
    <color name="color_background">#FF121212</color>
    <color name="color_surface">#FF1E1E1E</color>
    <color name="color_on_primary">#FFFFFFFF</color>
    <color name="color_on_surface">#FFFFFFFF</color>
    <color name="color_text_secondary">#FF888888</color>
</resources>
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/app/src/main/res/values/colors.xml", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("colors.xml written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write strings.xml
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<resources>
    <string name="app_name">MyCursurAI</string>
    <string name="build_status">Part 1 Baseline Build Successful</string>
</resources>
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("strings.xml written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write themes.xml
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<resources>
    <style name="Theme.MyCursurAI" parent="Theme.Material3.Dark.NoActionBar">
        <item name="colorPrimary">@color/color_primary</item>
        <item name="colorPrimaryVariant">@color/color_primary_dark</item>
        <item name="colorOnPrimary">@color/color_on_primary</item>
        <item name="colorSecondary">@color/color_accent</item>
        <item name="android:colorBackground">@color/color_background</item>
        <item name="android:statusBarColor">@color/color_background</item>
        <item name="android:navigationBarColor">@color/color_background</item>
        <item name="android:windowLightStatusBar">false</item>
    </style>
</resources>
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/app/src/main/res/values/themes.xml", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("themes.xml written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write activity_main.xml
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<LinearLayout
    xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:orientation="vertical"
    android:gravity="center"
    android:background="@color/color_background"
    android:padding="32dp">
    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tv_title"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:text="@string/app_name"
        android:textColor="@color/color_on_surface"
        android:textSize="32sp"
        android:textStyle="bold"
        android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />
    <TextView
        android:id="@+id/tv_status"
        android:layout_width="wrap_content"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:text="@string/build_status"
        android:textColor="@color/color_text_secondary"
        android:textSize="14sp"
        android:gravity="center" />
</LinearLayout>
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("activity_main.xml written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write MainActivity.java
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """package com.mycursurai.chat;

import android.os.Bundle;
import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity;

public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {

    @Override
    protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
        setContentView(R.layout.activity_main);
    }
}
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/app/src/main/java/com/mycursurai/chat/MainActivity.java", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("MainActivity.java written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Write proguard-rules.pro
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PYEOF'
content = """-keep class com.mycursurai.chat.** { *; }
-keepattributes *Annotation*
"""
with open("MyCursurAI-Native/app/proguard-rules.pro", "w") as f:
    f.write(content)
print("proguard-rules.pro written OK")
PYEOF

      - name: Verify all files written
        run: |
          echo "=== Project file tree ==="
          find MyCursurAI-Native -type f | sort
          echo "=== All files present ==="

      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('MyCursurAI-Native/**/*.gradle','MyCursurAI-Native/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-

      - name: Run assembleDebug
        working-directory: MyCursurAI-Native
        run: |
          gradle assembleDebug \
            --no-daemon \
            --stacktrace \
            -Dorg.gradle.jvmargs="-Xmx2g" \
            2>&1 | tee build_output.log

      - name: Evaluate build result
        working-directory: MyCursurAI-Native
        run: |
          if grep -q "BUILD SUCCESSFUL" build_output.log; then
            echo "========================================"
            echo "  BUILD SUCCESSFUL - Green Checkmark"
            echo "========================================"
            exit 0
          fi
          echo "BUILD FAILED - last 60 lines:"
          tail -60 build_output.log
          exit 1

      - name: Upload debug APK
        if: success()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: MyCursurAI-Native-Part1-debug
          path: MyCursurAI-Native/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
          retention-days: 14

      - name: Upload failure logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-failure-logs
          path: MyCursurAI-Native/build_output.log
          retention-days: 7
